case_title: 447 VALENCIA A LTD PARTNERSHIP VS SYAS GESSNER AND THOMAS MARGAIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY 447 VALENCIA A LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT SYAS GESSNER AND THOMAS MARGAIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1988 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 447 VALENCIA A LTD PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SYAS GESSNER AND THOMAS MARGAIE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $6.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $756.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SYAS GESSNER AND THOMAS MARGAIE HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
NOT. OF MOTION TO 447 VALENCIA RETURNED, NOT KNOWN.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-16-1993, DENIED
NOTICE OF RULING ON MOTION TO PLNTF. RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
NOT. OF RULING ON MOTION TO GESSNER SYAS RETURNED, FORW. ORDER EXPIRED.
